infrastructureAsCodeIssues.title: Object versioning is not enabled
infrastructureAsCodeIssues.impact: The accidental or malicious changes to object will not be reversible

iacDescription.impact: The accidental or malicious changes to object will not be reversible

infrastructureAsCodeIssues.title: Project wide ssh keys are allowed
infrastructureAsCodeIssues.issue: Project wide ssh keys grant access to compute instance
infrastructureAsCodeIssues.impact: Anyone with access to generic key can access the instance

iacDescription.issue: Project wide ssh keys grant access to compute instance
iacDescription.impact: Anyone with access to generic key can access the instance

infrastructureAsCodeIssues.title: Uniform bucket-level access disabled
infrastructureAsCodeIssues.issue: Cloud Storage uniform bucket-level access is not enabled
infrastructureAsCodeIssues.impact: Both bucket ACLs and IAM permissions can be used to grant permissions

iacDescription.issue: Cloud Storage uniform bucket-level access is not enabled
iacDescription.impact: Both bucket ACLs and IAM permissions can be used to grant permissions

infrastructureAsCodeIssues.title: GKE Alias IP disabled
infrastructureAsCodeIssues.issue: GKE cluster does not have Alias IP range defined
infrastructureAsCodeIssues.impact: GCP will not perform anti-spoofing checks against traffic
infrastructureAsCodeIssues.resolve: Set `ip_allocation_policy` attribute with dedicated IP ranges

remediation.terraform: Set `ip_allocation_policy` attribute with dedicated IP ranges

iacDescription.issue: GKE cluster does not have Alias IP range defined
iacDescription.impact: GCP will not perform anti-spoofing checks against traffic
iacDescription.resolve: Set `ip_allocation_policy` attribute with dedicated IP ranges

infrastructureAsCodeIssues.title: Cloud Storage bucket is publicly accessible
infrastructureAsCodeIssues.issue: Cloud Storage bucket grants all users access
infrastructureAsCodeIssues.impact: Potentially anyone can access data stored in the bucket

iacDescription.issue: Cloud Storage bucket grants all users access
iacDescription.impact: Potentially anyone can access data stored in the bucket

infrastructureAsCodeIssues.title: Default service account used
infrastructureAsCodeIssues.issue: Default service account granted to the instance
infrastructureAsCodeIssues.impact: Default compute engine account grants editor role permissions to the instance
infrastructureAsCodeIssues.resolve: Set `service_account` attribute with custom service account information

remediation.terraform: Set `service_account` attribute with custom service account information

iacDescription.issue: Default service account granted to the instance
iacDescription.impact: Default compute engine account grants editor role permissions to the instance
iacDescription.resolve: Set `service_account` attribute with custom service account information

infrastructureAsCodeIssues.title: GKE client certificate auth is enabled
infrastructureAsCodeIssues.issue: The client certificate authentication is not disabled
infrastructureAsCodeIssues.impact: The client certificate authentication methods is considered legacy and increase the attack surface for the cluster

iacDescription.issue: The client certificate authentication is not disabled
iacDescription.impact: The client certificate authentication methods is considered legacy and increase the attack surface for the cluster

infrastructureAsCodeIssues.title: Delete protection is disabled
infrastructureAsCodeIssues.issue: Deletion protection is disabled for this Google Compute Instance
infrastructureAsCodeIssues.impact: This critical system is not protected against deletion, accidental or intentionally malicious

iacDescription.issue: Deletion protection is disabled for this Google Compute Instance
iacDescription.impact: This critical system is not protected against deletion, accidental or intentionally malicious

infrastructureAsCodeIssues.title: GCP Compute Firewall allows public access
infrastructureAsCodeIssues.issue: That inbound traffic is allowed to a resource from any source instead of a restricted range
infrastructureAsCodeIssues.impact: That potentially everyone can access your resource
infrastructureAsCodeIssues.resolve: Set source_ranges to specific IP range only, e.g. `192.168.1.0/24`

remediation.terraform: Set source_ranges to specific IP range only, e.g. `192.168.1.0/24`

iacDescription.issue: That inbound traffic is allowed to a resource from any source instead of a restricted range
iacDescription.impact: That potentially everyone can access your resource
iacDescription.resolve: Set source_ranges to specific IP range only, e.g. `192.168.1.0/24`

infrastructureAsCodeIssues.title: GKE cluster might be publicly exposed
infrastructureAsCodeIssues.issue: GKE cluster might be publicly exposed
infrastructureAsCodeIssues.impact: Master endpoints or nodes may be configured with public addresses
infrastructureAsCodeIssues.resolve: Configure `private_cluster_config` block by setting `enable_private_nodes` and `enable_private_endpoint` attributes to true

remediation.terraform: Configure `private_cluster_config` block by setting `enable_private_nodes` and `enable_private_endpoint` attributes to true

iacDescription.issue: GKE cluster might be publicly exposed
iacDescription.impact: Master endpoints or nodes may be configured with public addresses
iacDescription.resolve: Configure `private_cluster_config` block by setting `enable_private_nodes` and `enable_private_endpoint` attributes to true

infrastructureAsCodeIssues.title: Google storage bucket does not use customer-managed keys to encrypt data
infrastructureAsCodeIssues.issue: Google storage bucket does not use customer-managed keys to encrypt data
infrastructureAsCodeIssues.impact: Google will manage the encryption keys on its servers and could access the data without authorization
infrastructureAsCodeIssues.resolve: Use encryption keys from self-managed key management service and configure the `encryption` block accordingly.

remediation.terraform: Use encryption keys from self-managed key management service and configure the `encryption` block accordingly.

iacDescription.issue: Google storage bucket does not use customer-managed keys to encrypt data
iacDescription.impact: Google will manage the encryption keys on its servers and could access the data without authorization
iacDescription.resolve: Use encryption keys from self-managed key management service and configure the `encryption` block accordingly.

infrastructureAsCodeIssues.title: GKE Network Policies enforcement disabled
infrastructureAsCodeIssues.issue: GKE network policies enforcement is disabled
infrastructureAsCodeIssues.impact: Network policies cannot be used as part of defense in depth controls

iacDescription.issue: GKE network policies enforcement is disabled
iacDescription.impact: Network policies cannot be used as part of defense in depth controls

infrastructureAsCodeIssues.title: GKE PodSecurityPolicy controller is disabled
infrastructureAsCodeIssues.issue: The PodSecurityPolicy controller is not enabled on the cluster
infrastructureAsCodeIssues.impact: The Pods cannot be constrained with PodSecurityPolicies, which increases the security management overhead

iacDescription.issue: The PodSecurityPolicy controller is not enabled on the cluster
iacDescription.impact: The Pods cannot be constrained with PodSecurityPolicies, which increases the security management overhead

infrastructureAsCodeIssues.title: Logging is not enabled on storage bucket
infrastructureAsCodeIssues.issue: Logging is not enabled on storage bucket
infrastructureAsCodeIssues.impact: Usage information will not be collected. This may impact ability to determine who accessed data stored in the bucket

iacDescription.issue: Logging is not enabled on storage bucket
iacDescription.impact: Usage information will not be collected. This may impact ability to determine who accessed data stored in the bucket

infrastructureAsCodeIssues.title: GKE cluster labels are missing
infrastructureAsCodeIssues.issue: GKE cluster does not have resource labels

iacDescription.issue: GKE cluster does not have resource labels

infrastructureAsCodeIssues.title: Customer supplied encryption keys are not used to encrypt VM compute instance
infrastructureAsCodeIssues.issue: Customer Supplied Encryption Keys are not used to encrypt VM compute instance
infrastructureAsCodeIssues.impact: Google will store your keys on it's servers and could access the data without your authorization
infrastructureAsCodeIssues.resolve: Ensure encrypting your VM with Customer Supplied Encryption Keys

remediation.terraform: Ensure encrypting your VM with Customer Supplied Encryption Keys

iacDescription.issue: Customer Supplied Encryption Keys are not used to encrypt VM compute instance
iacDescription.impact: Google will store your keys on it's servers and could access the data without your authorization
iacDescription.resolve: Ensure encrypting your VM with Customer Supplied Encryption Keys

infrastructureAsCodeIssues.title: Shielded VM disabled
infrastructureAsCodeIssues.issue: Shielded VM feature is not enabled on compute instance
infrastructureAsCodeIssues.impact: Advanced security features such as secure boot and firmware integrity checks will not be enabled on the instance

iacDescription.issue: Shielded VM feature is not enabled on compute instance
iacDescription.impact: Advanced security features such as secure boot and firmware integrity checks will not be enabled on the instance

infrastructureAsCodeIssues.title: Unrestricted SSH access
infrastructureAsCodeIssues.issue: Compute firewall allows all access to the SSH port
infrastructureAsCodeIssues.impact: SSH service may be accessible over the internet which defeats network segmentation controls
infrastructureAsCodeIssues.resolve: Set `source_ranges` attribute to specific IP range for example `192.168.0.0/24`

remediation.terraform: Set `source_ranges` attribute to specific IP range for example `192.168.0.0/24`

iacDescription.issue: Compute firewall allows all access to the SSH port
iacDescription.impact: SSH service may be accessible over the internet which defeats network segmentation controls
iacDescription.resolve: Set `source_ranges` attribute to specific IP range for example `192.168.0.0/24`

infrastructureAsCodeIssues.title: Customer supplied encryption keys are not used to encrypt compute disk
infrastructureAsCodeIssues.issue: Customer Supplied Encryption Keys are not used to encrypt compute disk
infrastructureAsCodeIssues.impact: Google will store your keys on it's servers and could access the data without your authorization
infrastructureAsCodeIssues.resolve: Ensure encrypting your VM with Customer Supplied Encryption Keys

iacDescription.issue: Customer Supplied Encryption Keys are not used to encrypt compute disk
iacDescription.impact: Google will store your keys on it's servers and could access the data without your authorization
